name: always_true
reason: If subset_of always holds, all_set would be trivially true regardless of inputs

name: always_false
reason: If subset_of never holds, all_set would be trivially false regardless of inputs

name: symmetric_subset
code:
proof fn phi_3_symmetric_subset(s: CommitMask, o: CommitMask)
    requires
        o@.subset_of(s@),
    ensures
        s@.subset_of(o@),
{
}
reason: Subset is not symmetric in general; this holding would mean all_set implies mutual containment

name: empty_self_contains_all
reason: A zero mask should have an empty view; nothing non-empty should be its subset

name: subset_implies_equal
code:
proof fn phi_5_subset_implies_equal(s: CommitMask, o: CommitMask)
    requires
        o@.subset_of(s@),
    ensures
        s@ =~= o@,
{
}
reason: Subset does not imply equality; this holding would collapse all_set to an equality check
